response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at multiple companies and current hands-on experience with AI agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at their current role. Strong engineering discipline is demonstrated through TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practice, plus teaching/workshop experience indicating communication skills. Main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and cloud-platform mentions, but the breadth of stack experience (Node, React, MongoDB, Docker, AWS CDK, Kubernetes) makes these likely bridgeable.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React across multiple production roles
Current hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus workshop/teaching track record
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack requirements
Kotlin/Java exposure is limited and dated (robotic arms work circa 2016-2018)
Significant portion of career invested in DLang, which is not part of the target stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience
